allow: Bash(cd /tmp/pvfu && find . -type f | head -60; echo "=== dll/exe ==="; find . -iname "*.dll" -o -iname "*.exe" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(cd /tmp/pvfu && strings -el pvfUtility.exe 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "7-zip [0-9]|p7zip" | head; echo "--- ascii ---"; strings pvfUtility.exe 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "7-zip [0-9]|SevenZipSharp|19\\.00|9\\.20|7z\\.dll" | head)

Bash(cd /tmp/7ztest && echo "=== default archive method ==="; 7z l -slt test.7z 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "Method|Block"; echo; echo "=== LZMA1 archive method ==="; 7z l -slt test2.7z 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "Method|Block")
